query:
ALTER TABLE orders 
ADD COLUMN source ENUM('internal', 'ifood', 'rappi', 'ubereats') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'internal',
ADD COLUMN externalId VARCHAR(100) NULL,
ADD COLUMN externalDisplayId VARCHAR(50) NULL,
ADD COLUMN externalStatus VARCHAR(50) NULL,
ADD COLUMN externalData JSON NULL;
